name: Super Mario Bros.
description: A classic platformer where Mario and Luigi journey through the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue Princess Toadstool from Bowser.

name: The Legend of Zelda
description: An action-adventure game where Link must rescue Princess Zelda and defeat the evil Ganon.

name: Pac-Man
description: Guide Pac-Man through a maze, eating pellets and avoiding ghosts in this iconic arcade game.

name: Tetris
description: A tile-matching puzzle game where players arrange falling blocks to clear lines.

name: Sonic the Hedgehog
description: A fast-paced platformer featuring Sonic as he battles Dr. Robotnik to save his animal friends.

name: Street Fighter II
description: A competitive fighting game with a diverse cast of characters and special moves.

name: Donkey Kong
description: Jumpman (Mario) must rescue Pauline from Donkey Kong in this classic arcade platformer.

name: Metroid
description: Explore the planet Zebes as Samus Aran in this action-adventure game with non-linear gameplay.

name: Mega Man 2
description: Guide Mega Man through robot master stages to defeat Dr. Wily in this challenging platformer.

name: Castlevania
description: Simon Belmont battles through Dracula's castle using his whip and sub-weapons.
